text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right! Today's leg presses are FINISHED!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Man, getting my workout game on just makes me
wanna work out even more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket catches me off guard with the
sudden question, and I scramble for an answer.
choice_data_list: Heck yeah! No pain, no gain!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That's what I'm saying! Working out after getting
tired is a different kind of fun!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Okay! More leg presses it is! Here comes another
ten sets! The limit doesn't exist for meee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She begins training furiously again, a radiant
smile on her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket's determination and stamina sure
are something.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oooh, a drink! Can I really have this? Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But why are you giving this to me?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're totally right! All right, I'm gonna get
my rest game on too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket leaves without taking the drink. It
seems like she's going to rest as hard as she
trained. Being able to switch from work to play is
an essential skill too.
